title: Vintage Press-heart talking bear
description: Press-heart talking bear — electronics repair, sewing and fabric repair, and cleaning and refresh.
itemDetails: Vintage brown plush talking teddy bear with cream muzzle and black oval nose; red heart patch on foot embroidered Press in white script (press-to-play voice module). Shaggy synthetic pile, seated style; small blue tag remnant at ear suggests retail label removed. Typical of 1980s–1990s Hong Kong/Taiwan/Korea sound-in-plush imports (exact OEM brand not confirmed from photos—compare to Emson, PBC, or gift-line bears with heart foot switches). Electronics: battery box and speaker in body, activation via foot switch. Market: nostalgic plush; value modest unless brand/tag identified. Confirm manufacturer from battery door or sewn label if opened for repair.
repairDetails: Vintage talking bear (legacy site gallery — short caption only; expand story when details are available).
